articles.title: Special Report: Heatwave Horror-Doctors Warn of Eye Damage, Heart Attack & Kidney Risk in Summer - Kanak News Odisha
articles.full_text:
ପ୍ରଚଣ୍ଡ ଖରାରେ ଖାଲି ହେଉନି ଅଂଶୁଘାତ | ଆଖି ଖରାପ କରୁଛି ତାତି ! ହୃତପିଣ୍ଡ,କିଡ୍ନିର ବି ଅବସ୍ଥା ହେଉଛି ଖରାପ
India is battling a severe heatwave, and doctors are now warning about its dangerous impact on human health.
From eye damage to heart stress and kidney problems — the extreme summer heat is becoming life-threatening.
Health experts say intense heat, dehydration, hot winds and UV rays are increasing cases of eye irritation, dry eyes, allergies and fatigue. Children spending long hours on mobile phones, TVs and laptops during summer holidays are also facing serious eye strain issues.
Doctors are advising people to follow the “20-20-20 rule” for eye safety and use UV-protective sunglasses while going outdoors.
At the same time, the body’s heart has to work harder to maintain temperature during extreme heat, increasing the risk of heart attack and abnormal heartbeat, especially among elderly people and heart patients.
Dehydration is also severely affecting kidneys, increasing the risk of kidney stones and urinary infections. Experts warn people to drink plenty of water and ORS to stay safe during the ongoing heatwave.
#Heatwave #SummerAlert #HealthNews #BreakingNews #IndiaWeather #HeatwaveIndia #EyeCare #HeartHealth #KidneyHealth #Dehydration #SummerHealth #WeatherAlert #ViralNews #HealthTips #OdishaNews
